name: Nutty White Chunk Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Light brown sugar, firmly packed
1 1/2 cups (8 oz) white chocolate bar, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix well with a wire whisk.
3. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, blend sugars at medium speed with an electric mixer.
5. Add butter and mix until a grainy paste forms, scraping the sides of the bowl.
6. Add eggs and vanilla extract, and beat until light and fluffy.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture, pecans, and white chocolate; blend until just combined.
8. Do not overmix.
9. Drop rounded tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheets, about 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 20-22 minutes or until edges are just beginning to turn golden brown.
11. Use a spatula to transfer cookies immediately to a cool flat surface.
